histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-002 occurred: Wrong or ambiguous block identity.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-001 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain wrong or ambiguous block identity and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical recovery transition: Release or redispatch blocked work after scope and resources are reconciled.
Executed canonical assignment transition: The foreman acknowledges the current assignment and confirms that field instructions and constraints are understood.
Executed canonical execution transition: The crew executes the work while preserving progress, actual resource use, and exception context at block or row scope.
Executed canonical completion transition: The foreman reports actual scope, labor, equipment, materials, completion status, and any unresolved exception without flattening partial work.
Executed canonical verification transition: The manager verifies field scope and actuals before closure data flows to progress, payroll, compliance, and cost records.

closure.summary: Wrong or ambiguous block identity closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-004 occurred: Work partially completed.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-002 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain work partially completed and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical completion transition: Close the explicitly accepted partial scope with attributed actuals.
Executed canonical verification transition: The manager verifies field scope and actuals before closure data flows to progress, payroll, compliance, and cost records.

closure.summary: Work partially completed closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-005 occurred: Completion quantities missing or disputed.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-009 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain completion quantities missing or disputed and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical correction transition: Append corrected closure quantities and the reason for change.
Executed canonical verification transition: Verify the corrected successor while retaining the original closure record.

closure.summary: Completion quantities missing or disputed closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-006 occurred: Wind or rain outside allowable conditions.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-001 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain wind or rain outside allowable conditions and preserve the affected scope before recovery.

closure.summary: Wind or rain outside allowable conditions closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain rei or phi conflict and preserve the affected scope before recovery.

closure.summary: REI or PHI conflict closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-010 occurred: Incorrect or late diary entry.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-009 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain incorrect or late diary entry and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical recovery transition: Resubmit the corrected diary or restriction record without overwriting history.
Executed canonical verification transition: The viticulturist performs and records follow-up monitoring to assess efficacy and determine further action.

closure.summary: Incorrect or late diary entry closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-012 occurred: System malfunction.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-003 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain system malfunction and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical recovery transition: Redispatch the safely remaining set after interruption review.
Executed canonical execution transition: The irrigator begins delivery and records observed system behavior, changes, interruptions, and actual timing.
Executed canonical completion transition: The irrigator records actual delivery, affected area, and any partial or uneven result rather than only planned duration.
Executed canonical verification transition: The irrigation lead verifies delivery evidence and routes water, nutrient, malfunction, and sustainability totals to their consumers.

closure.summary: System malfunction closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-016 occurred: Lab result arrives after action window.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-004 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain lab result arrives after action window and preserve the affected scope before recovery.

closure.summary: Lab result arrives after action window closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-021 occurred: Rapid weather or crop-condition change.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-001 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain rapid weather or crop-condition change and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical observation transition: Resample the affected block for a defensible revision.
Executed canonical recommendation transition: The viticulturist calculates a block forecast and interprets variation against historical and current-season evidence.
Executed canonical approval transition: The manager reviews the estimate, sampling confidence, crop-load implications, and downstream planning consequences.
Executed canonical completion transition: The approved forecast is published to winery, grower, labor, transport, container, budget, and contract planning consumers.
Executed canonical observation transition: The final harvest actual is linked to the published forecast without replacing the estimate or its assumptions.
Executed canonical reconciliation transition: The manager reconciles forecast versions with the harvest actual and records error, learning, and downstream planning consequences.

closure.summary: Rapid weather or crop-condition change closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-023 occurred: Actual harvest diverges materially.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-002 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain actual harvest diverges materially and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical observation transition: Resample the affected block for a defensible revision.
Executed canonical recommendation transition: The viticulturist calculates a block forecast and interprets variation against historical and current-season evidence.
Executed canonical approval transition: The manager reviews the estimate, sampling confidence, crop-load implications, and downstream planning consequences.
Executed canonical completion transition: The approved forecast is published to winery, grower, labor, transport, container, budget, and contract planning consumers.
Executed canonical observation transition: The final harvest actual is linked to the published forecast without replacing the estimate or its assumptions.
Executed canonical reconciliation transition: The manager reconciles forecast versions with the harvest actual and records error, learning, and downstream planning consequences.

closure.summary: Actual harvest diverges materially closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-024 occurred: Late or stale sample.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-001 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain late or stale sample and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical assignment transition: Schedule the next sample at the evidence-appropriate cadence.
Executed canonical observation transition: Collect a traceable sample against the block and subarea.
Executed canonical assignment transition: The traceable sample enters laboratory custody with expected timing and chain-of-identity intact.
Executed canonical completion transition: The laboratory processes the linked sample and returns Brix, pH, TA, and other agreed results.
Executed canonical exception transition: Contain field and winery measurements disagree and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical approval transition: Authorize the pick under the applicable contract authority.
Executed canonical assignment transition: The authorized pick becomes a dated labor, container, truck, and winery-slot commitment.

closure.summary: Late or stale sample closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-029 occurred: Winery changes timing or target.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-002 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain winery changes timing or target and preserve the affected scope before recovery.

closure.summary: Winery changes timing or target closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-030 occurred: Winery delay or changed tank capacity.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-001 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain winery delay or changed tank capacity and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical recovery transition: Resume transport after a slot or route delay is released.
Executed canonical completion transition: Acknowledge arrival without breaking load identity.
Executed canonical observation transition: Winery intake verifies load and block identity, records weight, and preserves the intake sample and condition evidence.
Executed canonical approval transition: The authorized winery role records acceptance, downgrade, or rejection against agreed tolerances without changing the observed intake evidence.
Executed canonical completion transition: Winery intake enters the accepted delivery with load, weight, quality, grower, vineyard, block, and timing identifiers.

Executed canonical reconciliation transition: Grower-relations compares the vineyard, transport, intake, buyer-system, quality, and contract records and opens a dispute or correction when they differ.
Executed canonical reconciliation transition: Finance uses the accepted and reconciled record set to produce settlement inputs while preserving later adjustment authority and history.

closure.summary: Winery delay or changed tank capacity closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-033 occurred: Wrong block or load identity.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-002 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain wrong block or load identity and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical correction transition: Open an attributable correction for disputed identity, weight, grade, or payment evidence.
Executed canonical correction transition: Append the authorized successor delivery record.
Executed canonical reconciliation transition: Reconcile the corrected delivery without erasing the disputed predecessor.
Executed canonical reconciliation transition: Finance uses the accepted and reconciled record set to produce settlement inputs while preserving later adjustment authority and history.

closure.summary: Wrong block or load identity closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-034 occurred: Rejected or downgraded load.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-009 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain rejected or downgraded load and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical reconciliation transition: Enter the rejected disposition for contract and settlement handling.

Executed canonical reconciliation transition: Grower-relations compares the vineyard, transport, intake, buyer-system, quality, and contract records and opens a dispute or correction when they differ.
Executed canonical reconciliation transition: Finance uses the accepted and reconciled record set to produce settlement inputs while preserving later adjustment authority and history.

closure.summary: Rejected or downgraded load closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-035 occurred: Late processor entry.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-011 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain late processor entry and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical correction transition: Append the authorized successor delivery record.
Executed canonical reconciliation transition: Reconcile the corrected delivery without erasing the disputed predecessor.
Executed canonical reconciliation transition: Finance uses the accepted and reconciled record set to produce settlement inputs while preserving later adjustment authority and history.

closure.summary: Late processor entry closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-037 occurred: Worker absent or crew short.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-001 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain worker absent or crew short and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical correction transition: Append an authorized labor correction with supporting evidence.
Executed canonical verification transition: Verify the corrected labor record before payroll acceptance.
Executed canonical reconciliation transition: Payroll accepts the verified labor record or opens an attributable correction instead of overwriting the submitted values.
Executed canonical reconciliation transition: Finance allocates accepted labor and activity quantities to block, task, payroll, and management cost records.

closure.summary: Worker absent or crew short closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-039 occurred: Heat or safety pause.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-002 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain heat or safety pause and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical recovery transition: Rebrief the crew before resuming paused work.
Executed canonical execution transition: The foreman records attendance, task changes, breaks, quantities, and attributable work as the crew executes.
Executed canonical completion transition: The foreman submits time, piece-rate units, task quantities, block allocation, and unresolved exceptions.
Executed canonical verification transition: The manager verifies that time, units, task progress, and assignment history form a credible submission.
Executed canonical reconciliation transition: Payroll accepts the verified labor record or opens an attributable correction instead of overwriting the submitted values.
Executed canonical reconciliation transition: Finance allocates accepted labor and activity quantities to block, task, payroll, and management cost records.

closure.summary: Heat or safety pause closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-044 occurred: Material or PPE out of stock.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-011 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain material or ppe out of stock and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical recovery transition: Evaluate an allowed substitute or alternate resource.
Executed canonical recommendation transition: Submit the validated substitute for approval.
Executed canonical approval transition: Approve the resource commitment within authority and budget.
Executed canonical assignment transition: Purchasing places the approved order or service commitment with required product, lot, delivery, and constraint details.
Executed canonical completion transition: Purchasing records receipt, lot or asset identity, quantity, condition, cost reference, and any discrepancy.
Executed canonical assignment transition: The coordinator stages the received resource for the specific work while preserving custody, calibration, and readiness context.
Executed canonical verification transition: The foreman verifies that the staged resource is safe, compliant, calibrated where applicable, and ready for release.
Executed canonical reconciliation transition: Finance reconciles the receipt, parts, service, labor, and resource use with purchasing and work-cost records.

closure.summary: Material or PPE out of stock closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-047 occurred: Equipment failure during a narrow work window.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-012 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain equipment failure during a narrow work window and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical assignment transition: Open a repair order with isolation and urgency context.
Executed canonical completion transition: Record parts, labor, and completed repair work.
Executed canonical verification transition: Verify safe return to service after repair.
Executed canonical recovery transition: Release the verified resource back to the affected plan.
Executed canonical reconciliation transition: Finance reconciles the receipt, parts, service, labor, and resource use with purchasing and work-cost records.

closure.summary: Equipment failure during a narrow work window closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-056 occurred: Delivery, downgrade, rejection, or payment dispute.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-001 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain delivery, downgrade, rejection, or payment dispute and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical recovery transition: Route the disputed issue to corrective or commercial resolution.
Executed canonical verification transition: Verify the corrective result and restore an aligned operating state.
Executed canonical completion transition: The relationship owner confirms that seasonal reporting, delivery, quality, and agreed obligations are fulfilled or explicitly excepted.
Executed canonical reconciliation transition: Finance and grower-relations reconcile delivery, commercial adjustment, dispute, and settlement history across both organizations.
Executed canonical supersession transition: The completed relationship version becomes historical while renewal, amendment, suspension, or ending creates a separately attributable successor state.

closure.summary: Delivery, downgrade, rejection, or payment dispute closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-051 occurred: Conflicting block aliases.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-009 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain conflicting block aliases and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical recovery transition: Route the disputed issue to corrective or commercial resolution.
Executed canonical verification transition: Verify the corrective result and restore an aligned operating state.
Executed canonical completion transition: The relationship owner confirms that seasonal reporting, delivery, quality, and agreed obligations are fulfilled or explicitly excepted.
Executed canonical reconciliation transition: Finance and grower-relations reconcile delivery, commercial adjustment, dispute, and settlement history across both organizations.
Executed canonical supersession transition: The completed relationship version becomes historical while renewal, amendment, suspension, or ending creates a separately attributable successor state.

closure.summary: Conflicting block aliases closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-057 occurred: Missing, late, contradictory, or buyer-specific record.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-001 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain missing, late, contradictory, or buyer-specific record and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical correction transition: Assign an evidence-gap corrective action with scope and owner.
Executed canonical execution transition: Execute the approved remediation while preserving the original finding.
Executed canonical completion transition: Submit attributed corrective evidence for independent review.
Executed canonical verification transition: Verify that corrective evidence resolves the recorded finding.
Executed canonical approval transition: The certifier issues the certification decision for the compliant review without implying corrective action occurred.
Executed canonical supersession transition: The completed certification cycle remains immutable and is archived when a new standard vintage or annual cycle becomes current.

closure.summary: Missing, late, contradictory, or buyer-specific record closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-061 occurred: Noncompliance discovered during audit.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-002 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain noncompliance discovered during audit and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical correction transition: Open corrective action only for a recorded finding.
Executed canonical execution transition: Execute the approved remediation while preserving the original finding.
Executed canonical completion transition: Submit attributed corrective evidence for independent review.
Executed canonical verification transition: Verify that corrective evidence resolves the recorded finding.
Executed canonical approval transition: The certifier issues the certification decision for the compliant review without implying corrective action occurred.
Executed canonical supersession transition: The completed certification cycle remains immutable and is archived when a new standard vintage or annual cycle becomes current.

closure.summary: Noncompliance discovered during audit closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.

histories.trigger: Canonical EXC-062 occurred: Certification withheld until corrective action.
histories.impact: The affected BLK-009 scope was contained without erasing completed, safe, or predecessor evidence.

recovery_actions.action: Realized the canonical exception transition: Contain certification withheld until corrective action and preserve the affected scope before recovery.
Executed canonical correction transition: Open corrective action for the finding that withheld certification.
Executed canonical execution transition: Execute the approved remediation while preserving the original finding.
Executed canonical completion transition: Submit attributed corrective evidence for independent review.
Executed canonical verification transition: Verify that corrective evidence resolves the recorded finding.
Executed canonical approval transition: The certifier issues the certification decision for the compliant review without implying corrective action occurred.
Executed canonical supersession transition: The completed certification cycle remains immutable and is archived when a new standard vintage or annual cycle becomes current.

closure.summary: Certification withheld until corrective action closed with attributable interruption, recovery, and retained successor evidence.
